Audio & Playback
Quality, Autoplay, Queue
Autoplay
Play similar tracks when queue ends
Stop music on app close
Save Queue
Restore playback after restart
Stream Quality
High (Default)
Eco (Data Saver)
Best quality (128kbps+)
Saves data on mobile networks
Unlock Restricted Tracks
Via NewPipe Extractor for Go+ tracks
Download Native DRM
Keep enabled to cache DRM natively for internal playback. Disable to force unencrypted MP3 downloads via YouTube fallback.
DRM-protected tracks are encrypted by rightsholders to prevent extraction and protect copyrights.\n\nâą Enabled (Recommended): The track is downloaded in its native high quality to KittyTune\'s secure internal cache. It can only be played inside the app and will not appear in your configured download folder.\n\nâą Disabled: KittyTune will ignore the encrypted version and attempt to find and download the song via YouTube. The file will be converted to a standard MP3 and saved in your designated folder. Warning: Since the search is automatic, it may download incorrect content (such as a music video or a cover) if the track is not well-known.
Lyrics
Display & Source
Prefer local files
Use embedded ID3 tags if available
Precise Search
Use artist + title for more accurate results
Alignment
Size
Show lyrics button
Show a quick access button on the player
Inline Lyrics
Display lyrics inside the player, replacing artwork

Highly Recommended
KittyTune needs notifications to show the music player in the background. Without it, you won\'t be able to pause or skip tracks outside the app.\n\nAre you sure you want to skip?
